testsuite.name: AlertEngine

testcase.name: evaluate: Redis dedup prevents duplicate alert within cooldown
evaluate: no active rules in module → no action
evaluate: value at threshold boundary (op=>) does NOT fire
evaluate: exceeds threshold fires alert and persists event
evaluate: value at threshold boundary (op=>=) fires alert
evaluate: Redis dedup key includes ruleId, sensorId, measureType

testsuite.system-out: 23:47:41.576 [Test worker] INFO com.uip.backend.alert.service.AlertEngine -- Alert created: sensor=sensor-1 measure=pm25 value=150.0 severity=HIGH 23:47:41.614 [Test worker] INFO com.uip.backend.alert.service.AlertEngine -- Alert created: sensor=sensor-1 measure=pm25 value=150.0 severity=HIGH 23:47:41.723 [Test worker] INFO com.uip.backend.alert.service.AlertEngine -- Alert created: sensor=sensor-1 measure=pm25 value=100.0 severity=HIGH 23:47:41.763 [Test worker] INFO com.uip.backend.alert.service.AlertEngine -- Alert created: sensor=sensor-42 measure=pm25 value=100.0 severity=HIGH
